title: Consultation for Mandatory Requirements of using Electronic Common Technical Document (eCTD) Format when Submitting Master Files (MFs) - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation for Mandatory Requirements of using Electronic Common Technical Document (eCTD) Format when Submitting Master Files (MFs)

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from May 7, 2018 to August 10, 2018.
Health Canada is considering January 1st, 2019 as the date for mandatory filing of all New Master Files in eCTD format. Feedback for this proposal is being solicited.

## Join in: How to participate
- Read our Notice: Consultation for Mandatory Requirements of using Electronic Common Technical Document (eCTD) Format when Submitting Master Files (MFs) .
- Provide your comments.
Send an email to hc.ereview.sc@canada.ca with your input or comments.

## Goals of the consultation
To identify stakeholder's concerns regarding the proposed mandatory date.

## Who is the focus of this consultation
We're seeking input from all interested parties, including:
Please submit your questions or comments by email:
hc.ereview.sc@canada.ca
